page.title: Settings
page.description: Configure the FHIR Server, motion preferences, and common app behavior

server.title: FHIR Server URL
server.description: Set the base URL of the target HAPI FHIR Server (baseR4)
server.urlHint: Enter the FHIR Server base URL, for example https://hapi.fhir.org/baseR4.
server.testFail: Connection failed. Please verify the URL or check your network.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Adjust motion, text scale, and how the app responds to higher system contrast preferences.
accessibility.motionDescription: Control how much motion is used in Live Demo, Feature Showcase, and major interface transitions. The app can follow the system setting or be overridden here.
accessibility.effectiveSystemFull: The app is following the system and reduced motion is currently off.
accessibility.effectiveSystemReduced: The app is following the system and reduced motion is currently on.
accessibility.behaviorHint: When reduced motion is active, the app softens spotlight movement and larger scale transitions, shortens autoplay pauses, and still keeps the Live Demo typewriter rhythm with a gentler pace.

system.label: Follow System
system.description: Respect the macOS or Windows reduced motion preference automatically.

full.label: Full Motion
full.description: Keep the current typewriter cadence, spotlight emphasis, and interface transitions.

reduced.label: Reduced Motion
reduced.description: Lower stronger movement and scaling while preserving useful rhythm and presence.

textScale.title: Text Scale
textScale.description: Adjust app text size across headings, forms, result lists, and most spacing that is based on `rem` units.
textScale.effectiveDescription: {{scale}} text scale is active across most text and rem-based interface spacing.
textScale.behaviorHint: This affects Creator, Consumer, Settings, and About together. Most layouts expand with the text so horizontal scrolling should stay minimal.

scale100.description: Default size for standard viewing distances.

scale112.description: A gentle increase for easier everyday reading.

scale125.description: A stronger increase for long forms and dense result views.

scale137.description: The largest size, prioritizing readability and recognition.

zoom.title: Interface Zoom
zoom.description: Adjust the overall application zoom, including cards, buttons, panels, and most interactive surfaces.
zoom.effectiveDescription: {{scale}} interface zoom is active across controls and layout surfaces.
zoom.behaviorHint: This uses Electron window zoom. If you want to keep the overall layout density and only enlarge text, adjust Text Scale above instead.

zoom100.description: Default interface size with the current layout density.

zoom110.description: A gentle increase for controls and spacing while keeping visual balance.

zoom125.description: A stronger increase that prioritizes target size and recognition.

focus.title: Focus Visibility
focus.description: Adjust how prominent keyboard focus indicators appear so the current target is easier to spot.
focus.behaviorHint: Enhanced mode adds a stronger outline and glow on top of the existing design, but only when keyboard focus is visible. It does not restyle ordinary mouse browsing.

standard.label: Standard
standard.description: Keep the current focus ring intensity and existing visual rhythm.

enhanced.label: Enhanced
enhanced.description: Use a thicker outline and stronger visibility for keyboard focus.

contrast.title: High Contrast Support
contrast.description: When the operating system requests higher contrast or forced colors, RxFHIR now strengthens focus visibility and boundary clarity automatically.
contrast.hint: This follows the system setting instead of adding a separate in-app toggle so the whole desktop stays consistent.

about.title: About RxFHIR
about.description: Desktop application for Taiwan Core electronic prescription profiles
about.spec: Based on MOHW EMR-IG Electronic Prescription 2.5 specification
about.advisorsNote: Listed alphabetically by English name; no ranking implied.

values.author: Yu-Ru Pan
values.affiliation: National Taipei University of Nursing and Health Sciences
